modules.name: Module 1: Semantic HTML, Web Accessibility & SEO

topics.title: Semantic Markup
subtopics: HTML5 semantic tags (header, section, article, aside, footer) vs generic div blocks
Document outlines

topics.title: Accessibility (a11y)
subtopics: ARIA roles, alt text attributes, keyboard focus states, screen readers tags

topics.title: SEO Foundations
subtopics: Meta tags configurations, title tags structure, heading hierarchies, semantic linkages

topics.title: Forms & Validations
subtopics: Input fields types, custom form tags attributes, regex validations, constraints

topics.title: Performance Optimization
subtopics: Image loading optimizations (lazy loading, srcset), responsive media formats

modules.name: Module 2: CSS Cascade, Box Model & Specificity Calculations

topics.title: CSS Specificity
subtopics: Selector weights calculations (inline, ID, class, element, !important) priority overrides

topics.title: CSS Box Model
subtopics: Content, padding, border, margins math, and box-sizing: border-box boundaries

topics.title: CSS Positioning
subtopics: Static, relative, absolute, fixed, sticky layouts coordinate offsets constraints

topics.title: Flexbox Layout
subtopics: Main axis vs cross axis alignments, flex-shrink/grow ratios, wrapping structures

topics.title: Grid Layout
subtopics: Explicit vs implicit grids, grid template areas, track sizes math (minmax, fr)

modules.name: Module 3: Advanced Layouts, Variables & Responsive Design

topics.title: Media Queries
subtopics: Breakpoints selection strategies, mobile-first design, adaptive screen layouts

topics.title: CSS Custom Properties
subtopics: Variables declarations, scopes dynamic runtime variations, fallbacks

topics.title: Transitions & Animations
subtopics: Keyframes timing functions (cubic-bezier), hardware acceleration transform parameters

topics.title: Typography & Units
subtopics: Absolute vs relative units (px vs rem, em, ch, vw/vh), font-loading layouts

topics.title: Browser Compatibility
subtopics: Vendor prefixes, feature queries (@supports), polyfills integrations

modules.name: Module 4: Git Fundamentals, Branching & Merge Conflicts

topics.title: Version Control
subtopics: Working directory, staging index, and git commit history structures

topics.title: Branching & Merging
subtopics: Git branch topologies, fast-forward merges, three-way merge commits

topics.title: Merge Conflicts
subtopics: Code conflicts indicators analysis, manual resolution, and git merge continue

topics.title: Git Remote
subtopics: Remote repository sync commands, git fetch vs pull, upstream tracking branch

topics.title: Git Stash & Checkouts
subtopics: Stashing modifications, git log commits checkout, detached HEAD resolution

modules.name: Module 5: Advanced Git Workflows, Rebase & Cherry-Pick

topics.title: Git Rebase
subtopics: Commits rebasing vs standard merges, interactive rebase squash and rewrite history

topics.title: Git Cherry-Pick
subtopics: Porting specific commits across feature branches, commits hashes mapping

topics.title: Git Reset vs Revert
subtopics: Soft/hard reset scopes vs git revert commit creations, restore command

topics.title: Git Hooks
subtopics: Client-side hooks (pre-commit, commit-msg), Husky configurations, lint validations

topics.title: Collaborative Workflows
subtopics: Git Flow vs GitHub Flow, Pull Request reviews process, tag releases
